channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Google’s Gemini 2.5 Pro could be the most important AI model so far this year
item.description: Google released its new Gemini 2.5 Pro Experimental AI model late last month, and it’s quickly stacked up top marks on a number of coding, math, and reasoning benchmark tests—making it a contender for the world’s best model right now.
item.dc:creator: Mark Sullivan, Fast Company

item.title: Microsoft founder Bill Gates reflects upon a 50-year-old computer code that reshaped technology
item.description: Even as he grows older, Microsoft founder Bill Gates still fondly remembers the catalytic computer code he wrote 50 years ago that opened up a new frontier in technology.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL LIEDTKE, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Leadership, trust, and innovation: The keys to AI’s role in modern warfare
item.description: From ensuring the quality of data to fostering a culture of experimentation and adaptability, leaders must actively steer AI’s integration into operations. The post Leadership, trust, and innovation: The keys to AI’s role in modern warfare first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: commentators, Federal News Network

item.title: Tariff war throws building of data centers into disarray
item.description: Enterprise IT leaders are facing a double-whammy of uncertainties complicating their data center building decisions: The ever-changing realities of genAI strategies, and the back-and-forth nature of the current tariff wars pushed by the United States. “This is obviously a fluid situation.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: A behind-the-scenes look at Nintendo Switch 2
item.description: Nintendo’s Switch 2 is bigger and better than its predecessor of eight years past as the video game developer pushes to bring its brand into “a new era” where social experiences are at the forefront.
item.dc:creator: Ryan Kryska, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: The Project Velocity Problem: How to Solve it with Lucid Software's Cloud Accelerator
item.description: Cloud and devops teams face a velocity problem, struggling to keep pace with updating outdated systems, building new ones, and meeting business unit requests. Lucid Software's Cloud Accelerator is designed to remove these barriers, accelerating project velocity and cloud initiatives.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Five Nights at Freddy's 2 gets December 2025 release date and first teaser, but you won't be able to watch it at home straight away
item.description: Peacock doesn't think you're ready for this Freddy as Five Nights at Freddy's 2 gets a theater-only release date.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Adobe Premiere Pro updates bring some serious AI power
item.description: Adobe is leveraging AI in version 25.2 of Premiere Pro for Generative Extend, auto caption translation and more.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: The Tumblr revival is real—and Gen Z is leading the charge
item.description: Rumors of a Tumblr comeback have been bubbling for a couple of years—think a pair of Doc Martens here, a splash of pastel hair dye there. Now, Gen Z is embracing the platform as a refuge from an internet saturated with influencers and algorithm fatigue.
item.dc:creator: Eve Upton-Clark, Fast Company

item.title: Networking terms and definitions
item.description: To find a brief definition of the networking term you are looking for user your browser’s “Find” feature then follow links to a fuller explanation. AI networking AI networking refers to the application of artificial intelligence (AI) technologies to network management and optimization.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Most workers are greatly overestimating their AI skills
item.description: Workers are claiming higher AI familiarity, yet they’re still unsure about how or whether they should even use it at work.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: An AI watchdog accused OpenAI of using copyrighted books without permission
item.description: An artificial intelligence watchdog is accusing OpenAI of training its default ChatGPT model on copyrighted book content without permission.
item.dc:creator: Jessica Bursztynsky, Fast Company

item.title: Turkish Government Hits Meta with Hefty Fine over Social Media Content Restrictions
item.description: Meta, the parent company of Facebook and Instagram, has been hit with a substantial fine by the Turkish government for resisting demands to limit content on its platforms.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: CERN scientists release blueprint for the Future Circular Collider
item.description: Top minds at the world’s largest atom smasher have released a blueprint for a much bigger successor that could vastly improve research into the remaining enigmas of physics.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fast Company

item.title: IBM Cloud speeds AI workloads with Intel Gaudi 3 accelerators
item.description: IBM Cloud is broadening its AI technology services with Intel Gaudi 3 AI accelerators now available to enterprise customers.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Coal-fired power plant, now retired, to become massive gas-powered campus for AI, data centers
item.description: What was once Pennsylvania’s biggest coal-fired power plant is being turned into a $10 billion natural gas-powered data center campus designed to capitalize on Big Tech's fast-growing energy demands.
item.dc:creator: Marc Levy, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Linux Foundation Networking shares new AI projects, milestone releases
item.description: The Linux Foundation’s networking division (LF Networking) is continuing to grow both its mandate and project roster in 2025.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Why no one is challenging Trump's executive order that keeps TikTok running
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — After TikTok was banned in the United States earlier this year, President Donald Trump gave the platform a reprieve, barreling past a law that was passed in Congress and upheld unanimously by the Supreme Court that said the ban was necessary for national security.
item.dc:creator: SARAH PARVINI and MARK SHERMAN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: HTMX and Alpine.js: How to combine two great, lean front ends
item.description: HTMX and Alpine are two low-overhead ways to empower your front end. Neither requires a build step, and both let you add Ajax-style API calls and client-side UI updates with minimal fuss.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: CMMC review, multiuse SCIFs on radar of DoD acquisition nominee
item.description: Michael Duffey, the nominee to be USD for acquisition and sustainment, told lawmakers he's sensitive to CMMC compliance challenges for small businesses. The post CMMC review, multiuse SCIFs on radar of DoD acquisition nominee first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Justin Doubleday, Federal News Network

item.title: Trump to hold a meeting on possible investors to buy TikTok with possible ban at stake
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — President Donald Trump will hold a Wednesday meeting with aides about possible investors who could buy a stake in TikTok, a deal that could potentially stop the social media site from being banned in the United States.
item.dc:creator: SARAH PARVINI and JOSH BOAK, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Understand Python’s new lock file format
item.description: Python Enhancement Proposal (PEP) 751 gives Python a new file format for specifying dependencies. This file, called a lock file, promises to allow developers to reproduce the installation of their Python projects, with the exact same sets of dependencies, from system to system.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Emergency Chrome security update amid cyber espionage threats
item.description: Tech expert Kurt “CyberGuy" Knutsson reports that researchers have uncovered a Chrome vulnerability used in a cyber espionage campaign.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Amazon, OpenAI, and China’s Zhipu unveil new AI tools amid intensifying competition
item.description: A wave of new AI products is hitting the market, signaling a shift toward more autonomous, task-completing systems that could reshape how businesses and consumers interact with digital services. Amazon has unveiled Nova Act, an AI agent designed to operate a web browser much like a human user.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: At the VA, modernizing healthcare delivery rests in patient’s control of their data
item.description: Neil Evans, acting program executive director for electronic health record modernization at VA said the VA has always had some form of electronic health record. The post At the VA, modernizing healthcare delivery rests in patient’s control of their data first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Michele Sandiford, Federal News Network

item.title: Dow wants to power its Texas manufacturing complex with new nuclear reactors instead of natural gas
item.description: Dow, a major producer of chemicals and plastics, wants to use next-generation nuclear reactors for clean power and steam at a Texas manufacturing complex instead of natural gas. Dow's subsidiary, Long Mott Energy, applied Monday to the U.S. Nuclear Regulatory Commission for a construction permit.
item.dc:creator: JENNIFER McDERMOTT, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Jack Black, Jason Momoa enter the Minecraft universe as the video game phenom hits the big screen
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — When Jack Black got the call to star in the “Minecraft” movie, the perks were plenty. He got to work alongside Jason Momoa, reunite with “Nacho Libre” director Jared Hess and engulf himself into a beloved gaming universe.
item.dc:creator: JONATHAN LANDRUM Jr., Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: New phishing attack uses real-time interception to bypass 2FA
item.description: This phishing kit bypasses 2FA via session hijacking and real-time credential theft. Kurt “CyberGuy" Knutsson offers four ways to stay safe from Astaroth phishing attacks.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: DoD Modernization Exchange 2025: Savan Kong on building first Pentagon CX Office from the ground up
item.description: DoD’s former CXO shares details from the young office’s efforts to begin scaling customer experience across the department. The post DoD Modernization Exchange 2025: Savan Kong on building first Pentagon CX Office from the ground up first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Anastasia Obis, Federal News Network

item.title: China's telecoms giant Huawei Technologies says its profit fell 28% while revenue surged in 2024
item.description: BANGKOK (AP) — Chinese telecoms gear giant Huawei said Monday its net profit fell 28% in 2024 while its revenue surged, as the company invested heavily in advanced technologies.
item.dc:creator: ELAINE KURTENBACH, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: An AI-based drone that speeds up the detection and monitoring of wildfires is presented in Germany
item.description: EBERSWALDE, Germany (AP) — A company that specializes in early wildfire detection has developed a new, AI-based drone it says will help speed up the detection, location and monitoring of fires.
item.dc:creator: PIETRO DE CRISTOFARO, Associated Press, NewsNation
